title: ELICIA AT THE ROBERTS
subtitle: CAMEO · VI·Lovers · 4:14 PM · The Anya tape
epigraph_upright: Elicia drives over from the bungalow with the Anya footage on a small tape and a smaller VCR in the back seat. The Roberts' VCR died in '19. The tape is, by Elicia's edit, six minutes long. Mackenzie has, for two months, said: I want to see it.
epigraph_reversed: Elicia drives over with the tape. She gets to the front walk. She sees Mackenzie's car in the driveway with the trunk open and Philip carrying a basket of laundry. She turns around. The tape goes back in the bungalow's drawer for another two months.
scene_description: Easy cameo. The Priestess's archive on the Lovers' floor. Elicia carries her haunted work into a grounded room and lets Mackenzie watch.
direction_hint: Cue the tape on the couch. Watch with Mackenzie. Decide whether to take the tape back. Leap.
opening_log_lines: 4:14 PM. Elicia at the front walk with the VCR.
Mackenzie at the kitchen window, seeing you pull up.
The tape in your bag is, by your edit, six minutes long.

scenario_action_cards.title: CUE THE TAPE
scenario_action_cards.flavor: You set the VCR on the Roberts' TV stand. The Anya footage cues to the first frame. The Roberts' living room is, for six minutes, the bungalow.

scenario_action_cards.title: TAKE THE TAPE BACK
scenario_action_cards.flavor: Mid-watch you eject the tape. Mackenzie does not, this afternoon, ask why. Elicia gains the small harvest of the work staying hers; Mackenzie remains on the verge of a connection that does not, today, complete.

scenario_visitors.name: Mackenzie (on the couch)
scenario_visitors.lore_text: Mackenzie at the Roberts' couch with the iced tea and the throw blanket. She has been asking for the tape for two months. She is, this afternoon, ready.

steps.greet: Mackenzie pats the couch beside her. Iced tea on the side table.
steps.listen: She asks small questions about the production: where, when, how Anya came on camera. You answer briefly.
steps.deliver: You queue the tape. The first frame settles. Mackenzie's hand goes, instinctively, to the throw blanket's hem.
steps.sit_with: You watch the six minutes together. Mackenzie does not, in the second minute, look away. At the end she says, simply: thank you.

scenario_visitors.name: Anya (on the TV)
scenario_visitors.lore_text: Anya from Elicia's archive, on Mackenzie's TV. An off-platform visitor — Elicia is the only one who can connect with her here, even though she's on Mackenzie's screen.

steps.frame_one: The first frame settles. The blue-gel light from the bungalow lives, on the Roberts' CRT, slightly cooler.
steps.let_it_play: The footage plays. You have, by edit forty, the cuts memorized.
steps.name_her: You name her, internally, the way you did the first time you cut the footage. The flag anya_named_at_the_roberts goes on.
steps.let_it_end: The tape ends. The screen blue-screens for two seconds before the VCR catches up. Mackenzie does not, this afternoon, ask for a second viewing.

stagnation_thresholds.label: the front walk in afternoon light.
the VCR is, by year four out of warranty, slightly tetchy.
the iced tea has, by minute eight, lost its cold.
you drove home without ever putting the VCR on the stand.

doubt_thresholds.label: elicia on the roberts' front walk.
the tape in your bag is, today, smaller than it has felt.
mackenzie's eyes during minute three are the eyes you cut for.
the tape, once watched here, becomes a different tape.

notes: Easy cameo · Elicia bringing Anya to Mackenzie. Novel mechanic: VISITOR-ON-ANOTHER-HOST'S-SCREEN. anya_on_the_tv spawns at Mackenzie's living-room TV but is visible_to_hand_only:elicia. First cross-arcana visitor presence with hand-gating.
ambient_pool: the Roberts' VCR makes the small ratcheting sound it makes.
the iced tea condenses on the side table.
the throw blanket on the couch is the throw blanket from her mother.
